title: Palpitations and Weight Loss - Graves Disease
chief_complaint: Weight loss of 5 kg in 2 months despite increased appetite, palpitations, heat intolerance, and tremors

patient_responses.weight_loss: I lost 5 kg even though I'm eating more than usual
patient_responses.heat: I feel hot all the time, even when others are cold
patient_responses.palpitations: My heart races even when I'm resting
patient_responses.eyes: People say my eyes look bigger

hints.thyroid: Check TSH, free T4, free T3
